seoTitle: Polk County School Calendar 2028-2029: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Polk County Public Schools 2028-2029 calendar with Aug 10 first day, May 30 last day, breaks, early dismissal, storm make-up days, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Polk County Public Schools starts the 2028-2029 school year on August 10, 2028 and lists May 30, 2029 as the last day for students with a 150-minute early dismissal. Fall Break runs November 20-24, Winter Break runs December 18-January 3, and Spring Break runs March 12-16. The official calendar lists storm make-up days on November 20, November 21, January 3, and May 30.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Polk County start school in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Polk County Public Schools starts school on Thursday, August 10, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Polk County Spring Break in 2029?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 12 through Friday, March 16, 2029.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Polk County in 2029?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day for students is Wednesday, May 30, 2029, with a 150-minute early dismissal.

calendarFaqs.q: Which Polk 2028-2029 dates are storm make-up days?
calendarFaqs.a: The official calendar lists November 20, November 21, January 3, and May 30 as storm make-up days.

yearNumbers.label: Early Dismissals
yearNumbers.detail: Students are dismissed 150 minutes early on ten listed dates.

yearNumbers.label: Storm Make-Up Days
yearNumbers.detail: Listed make-up dates are November 20, November 21, January 3, and May 30.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break runs Monday through Friday in mid-March.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2027-2028 Calendar
content: The first student day remains August 10.
Spring Break moves from March 13-17 in 2028 to March 12-16 in 2029.
The last student day moves from May 25 in 2028 to May 30 in 2029.
